data.content: Implementation review rejected: getDisplayedBeatAliases strips project prefixes from aliases via .replace(/^[^-]+-/, '') at line 228. Requirement shows format 'proj-1234 | proj-5678.3 (alias)' where aliases retain full project-qualified form. Current code turns 'proj-5678.3' into '5678.3'. Fix: remove the prefix stripping from getDisplayedBeatAliases — keep aliases as-is and only deduplicate exact matches against beat.id (may require passing beat.id into the function). Update the test to verify cross-project aliases retain their prefix.
